hooks.prompt:
The tool input is: $ARGUMENTS

The file being written or edited is inside src/. Before allowing this, verify:
1. If the file path is src/components/**, does the JSX live under src/components/<role>/<feature>/ and the CSS under src/components/css/<role>/<feature>/? Role must be one of: student, teacher, admin, shared.
2. If the file path is src/pages/**, does the JSX live under src/pages/<role>/ and the CSS under src/pages/css/<role>/?
3. Does the CSS file (if being written) use only CSS variables (var(--...)) and never hardcode hex values?
4. Is the CSS import at the top of any JSX file using the correct relative path to the mirror css/ folder?

If all checks pass, output: {"decision": "allow"}
If any check fails, output: {"decision": "block", "reason": "<which rule was violated and the correct path/pattern to use>"}
hooks.statusMessage: Checking file placement & design system rules...
